hero.title: Bapuji Educational Association
hero.subtitle: A legacy of education, excellence, and service since 1958

about.title: About the Association
about.description: The Bapuji Educational Association, established in 1958, is one of the oldest and most prestigious educational institutions in Karnataka. It was founded with the vision of providing quality higher education to aspiring students. Over the years, it has expanded into a wide network of institutions covering diverse fields.

growth.title: Growth & Impact
points: Courses from Nursery to Post Graduation
A strong contribution to the development of Davangere

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: The most significant personality behind the development of the association, whose vision and leadership have shaped its success.

anthem.title: BEA Anthem
lines: We are the seekers of knowledge and wisdom
We are the torchbearers of truth and justice
We are the champions of innovation and excellence
We are the leaders of tomorrow's world
We learn from the past and shape the future
We face every challenge with courage and grace
We strive for the highest ideals and values
We are one, we are many, we are one family
We are the Bapuji Educational Association

davangere.title: About Davangere
davangere.description: Davangere, located on National Highway 4, is a major educational hub of Karnataka. Once known as the 'Manchester of Karnataka' for its textile industry, it is now called the 'Oxford of Karnataka' due to its educational growth. The city hosts numerous institutions catering to students from across India and abroad.
